raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas KUNGS irr man
parahdijees no tahtenes/ es ef-
mu tewi mihtojs ar weenu muh-
schigu Mihlestibu/ tadeht efinu
es tewi schehligt atwilzis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es uhshtaifschu tewi atkaſ/
un tu tapſi uhszelta ak Israeta
Jumprawa! tu tapſi atkaſ is-
pufchkota ar tawahm Bun-
gahm/ un tseefi ar Deeschanns
Stabulehm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tu dehstit atkaſ Wih-
na-Dahrsus us Samarijas Kal-
neem/ tee Dehstitajt tohs deh-
stihs/ un tur klaht stabulehs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo weena Deena buhs/
luxra tee Sargi us Gewraima
Kalnu faufs: Zelleetees/ eima
augſcham us Zianu/pee ta KUN-
GA mufhu Deewa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo taſakka tas KUNGS:
Gauzeet pahr Jehkabu ar Lihgl-
nibu/ un gawilejeet pahr to Pa-
gano Galwu/ leezeet to dsirdeht/
etizeet un fafkajt: Ak KUNgs!
vesti tawus Laudis/ tohs Atlik-
utchus no Israeta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Reds/ es atweddiſchu tohs
no tahs Semmes prett Secme-
la Puſſi/ un tapulzinachn tohs
no tahs Semmes Mallahm/
wirro Starpa buhs Akli un
Tifli / Aggruhtinatas un kas
semde koypa/ ar leeſu Draudsi
ee tchurp atgreeſifees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee nahks ar Randateba-
m/ un ar Labdarriſchanahin
ribbu es tohs waddiht/es wad-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Klaufajt ta KUNGA
Wahrdw juhs Bagaki/ un find-
dinaje et eekſch Gallahm/ kas
tahtu irraid/ un fafkajt: Kas J-
sraelu irr iſkaifijes/ tas winnu
atkaſ fapulzinahs/ un fargahs
to/ ka weens Gans jawu gan-
nu Puſku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tas KUNGS irr
Jehkabu iſpirzis/ un irr winnu
iſglahbis no ta Rohkas/ kas stip-
raks bija neka winſch.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee nahks/ un gawi-
lehs us Zianas Augſtumu/ un
atskrees pee ta KUNGA Labbu-
ma/ pee Labbibas/ un pee Wih-
na/ un pee Etjes/ un pee teem
jauneem fihkeem Lobpeem/ un
Wehrſcheem/ un winnu Dweh-
tele buhs ka tweens uhdenaintsch
Dahrs/ un tee ne buhs joproh-
jam wairs noskummusch.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad preezafees ta Jum-
prawa pee Deeschanns/ ir tee
Jaunekti vn Wezzi koypa. Jo
es pahrwehrtischu winno No-
skumschann par Preeku/ un ee-
preezinachu tohs/un eelihqfino-
schu tohs pehz winnu Noskum-
schanns.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es piſdischu to Bree-
steru Dwehseli ar Taukein/ un
manni Laudis taps ar mannu
Labbumy pee-chdinati/ fafkatas
KUNGS.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
